scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace @diplom/server" "npm run dev --workspace voistra-desktop"
scripts.dev:infra: docker compose up -d postgres redis coturn
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @diplom/server && npm run build --workspace voistra-desktop
scripts.dist:desktop: npm run build --workspace @diplom/server && npm run build --workspace voistra-desktop && npm run dist:win --workspace voistra-desktop
